game_name: Might and Magic VI: The Mandate of Heaven

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this RPG

special_mechanics.name: First-Person Movement
special_mechanics.description: Players control four-character party with full 360-degree turning and vertical look capability in first-person view

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Fully explorable overland maps with scalable mountains, departure from grid-based movement system

special_mechanics.name: Combat Movement Restriction
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based combat mode severely limits player movement compared to real-time mode

tier_notes: Tier 2: RPG documentation emphasizes gameplay mechanics and narrative over precise physics parameters. No movement speed, gravity, or jump mechanics are quantified in available sources. Game prioritizes character progression and world exploration over platforming physics.
